title: EVIDENCE

CHAPTER 2.  EVIDENCE

PART I.  THINGS THAT NEED NOT BE PROVED -- PRIMA

FACIE EVIDENCE -- PRESUMPTIONS

§422.  Repealed by Acts 1988, No. 515, §8., eff. Jan. 1, 1989.
